explanation_box.text: This reptile, distinguished by its large and attractive eyes, possesses a moderate overall reproductive capacity.
The reproductive capacity of this reptile - which appears so gentle - is by no means high.
With a body coloration that allows it to camouflage itself amidst surrounding leaves and grass, and equipped with sharp claws, this reptile possesses a remarkably high reproductive capacity.

prompt_continuous: Reptiles varied in whether they had ROUND feet or POINTY, CURLY feet. Did having CURLY/POINTY or ROUND feet make a difference to fertility? If you did not notice this feature or believe it did not make a difference to fertility, please hit no and proceed.
question_text: Did foot shape matter to the fertility of reptiles?

question_text: Did color matter to the fertility of reptiles?
